title: C++ compile error no match for 'operator==' @ 4f1f487ae

features.name: struct with unpacked array member in parameterized class
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef defined inside a parameterized class, where the struct contains an unpacked array member field

features.name: virtual class struct with unpacked array members
features.description: Code should include a virtual class with a parameterized struct typedef that contains both a unpacked array and a parameterized type array member

features.name: struct operator== comparison with unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a comparison between two struct variables that contain unpacked array members, triggering auto-generated operator==
